Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hive]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Hive was an Iron Legion ritual room that was destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The disruption of a ritual caused significant damage to the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Bishop is located at the center of a Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The characters are currently in the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The outside of the Hive is described as an Iron Hell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Hive projects standard starship shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Sola may have seen certain things in a Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — Hives are units used by the Iron Legion.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — A Hive can be delivered.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
